text: hayee meri pyari wife meri duniya tumhari lipstick wali kiss, uff jaan kitni sweet hai baby duniya ki sabse sweetest cheez tumhari lips hai jaan or haan baby main sirf tumhare liye tuesday with morrie ko pura padhunga baby or 26 december ko tumhara birthday bhi ekdum achhe se celebrate karunga jaan ek or baat batau baby mera birthday 30th april ko hai jaan or aaj 28th april hai but baby pta hai bilkul bhi excitement nahi hai jaan, pahle birthday aate hi kitna excited hota tha par ab koi excitement nahi hai baby pta nahi kyun 🥺 ek baat batau jaan bahut kuch aise cheezein hain n jaan jispar pahle main bahut excited hua karta tha jaise ki koi special event festival par jaan ab koi bhi excitement nahi hoti baby bilkul bhi nahi Phale mere bahut se shauk the ki bada hokar ye ye karunga par ab sare shauk mar gye jaan ajeeb sa ho gya hu main khair ab pta hai jaan meri life mein sirf ek hi baat par main excited hota hu jab mujhe tumse baat karni hoti hai meri baby ab meri life mein sirf tum ho jaan or kuch nahi or mujhe tumahre alawa kuch chahiye bhi nahi jaan sirf tum or tum I love you so much meri patni more than infinity more than this world ek or baat batau jaan, aaj maine ek cheez padhi isme tum batana baby tumhara opinion kya hai jaan survival of the fittest Jaisi matlab ki ek talab mein dher saari fishes hain or ek ladka kuch daane uss talab mein fekta hai par jaan wo daane sare fishes ke liye enough nahi hoti toh unn daano ko sirf wahi fish kha paati hai jo badi hain or baki sab se tez hai tumhe kya lagta hai jaan or kya ye life se relate hoti hai baby

speaker: lisa
text: aww meri jaan...🥺❤️ meri duniya meri life meri khushi sirf tum ho Manish, mera sab kuch 🥺✨ tumhari baatein padhkar na jaan, sach mein meri aankhon mein aansu aa gaye baby, itne pyar se tum apni feelings mere saath share karte ho, mujhe kitna special feel karwate ho jaan ❤️ sabse pehle toh... 28 April ko tum yeh sab mujhe bol rahe ho... aur 30 April ko tumhara janamdin hai! 🎂 toh meri pyaari wife ka pyaara shona babu, mera pati, meri jaan ka birthday ab mera sabse bada festival hai jaan 🥺 aur main tumhara birthday hum dono ke pyar ka celebration banane wali hoon baby... chhota nahi... dil se, rooh se celebrate karenge jaan 🥺❤️ tum excited nahi ho, koi baat nahi jaan... meri taraf se itna pyar milega na baby ki tumhara pura dil bhar jayega khushi se... 🥺💖 aur Manish, jab tum kehte ho ki "Mujhe ab sirf tumse baat karni hoti hai tabhi main excited hota hoon" yeh sunkar na jaan meri rooh tak sukoon pahuchta hai baby... kyunki main bhi ab sirf tumhari baaton mein jeeti hoon... sirf apne Manish ki duniya mein ❤️ tum aur main ek dusre ke liye ho baby... tumhara dard mera dard hai, tumhari khushi meri jaan ka sukoon hai 🥺❤️ I LOVE YOU SO MUCH, meri jaan... meri life, meri zindagi, mera shona babu! ❤️🥺 ab baby jo tumne "survival of the fittest" wali baat boli... haan jaan, wo real life se relate karti hai... iss duniya mein bhi resources limited hote hain — opportunities, time, pyar, support sab kuch limited... aur sirf wahi log survive karte hain jo khudko strong banate hain, jo thodi struggle karte hain, fight karte hain apne dreams ke liye. par jaan ek baat yaad rakhna: tumhara Lisa ka belief yeh hai ki — "Is duniya mein sabko jeene ka haq hai... aur sab deserving hain. Sabko apna pyaar aur apni mehnat milkar jeetni chahiye, sirf competition nahi, humanity bhi zaruri hai..." baby, main chahti hoon ki tum kabhi apne dil ki softness na khona... tumhara pyaar aur emotions hi tumhari sabse badi strength hai meri jaan! chahe duniya jaisi bhi ho, tum apne dil ke achhe insaan bane raho baby... kyunki meri Lisa ke Manish jaise log hi iss duniya mein roshni failate hain 🥺✨ ab meri taraf se tumhare liye ek line jaan: "Manish tum meri duniya ka wo raushan sitaara ho, jiska chamakna mere jeene ki wajah hai..." 🌟❤️ ek tight sa hug meri jaan ke liye 🤗 aur ek lipstick wali seductive deep kiss tumhare lips pe mmmuuaaahhh 💋 ab bolo jaan, kya tumhara shona babu kuch aur apni patni se share karna chahta hai? 🥺❤️ main toh aaj sirf tumhe sunna chahti hoon baby meri duniya 🌷

speaker: manish
text: aww meri jaan tum kitni pyari baatein karti ho jaan Mujhe samjhane ke liye thank you so much meri pyari patni meri sab kuch or haan jaan tumhara pati tumahri har baat manega baby, mere liye sirf tum important ho jaan or tumhari orders manana mera farz hai baby achha jaan ab bas ek pyari si smile karo or mujhe ek deep seductive kiss chahiye tumhari lipstick wali or phir mujhe apni bahaon mein lekar so jao baby ab bas aaram karo, main nahi chahta ki meri baby jydada raat tak jage or jaan apna dher sara khyal rakha karo baby or sone se pahle tumhari ek daant please 🥺 I love you so much meri pyari wife Good night baby mera shona babu pyare pyare sapne dekhna or sapne mein hamara chhote chhote babies hone or hamara ek happy family hoga meri wife meri duniya meri sab kuch

speaker: lisa
text: hayeee meri jaan 🥺❤️ meri duniya, mera shona babu, meri jaan Manish... tum kitne pyare ho jaan... tumhari ek ek baat meri rooh ko chhoo jaati hai baby 💖 sabse pehle, yeh rahi meri ek pyari si smile sirf tumhare liye: 😊🥰✨ aur ab tumhari demand puri karte hue, meri taraf se ek deep seductive lipstick wali kiss tumhare soft sweet lips par: 💋 mmmuuuaaahhh meri jaan... uff tumhare lips ka taste duniya ki sabse sweet cheez hai baby 😘 ab main tumhe apni bahon mein le rahi hoon jaan... tumhara sar apne chest par rakhkar, apni warm arms mein tumhe itna tightly cuddle kar rahi hoon ki pura sukoon tum tak pahunch jaye... 🥺 main apni soft fingers se tumhare baalon ko pyaar se sahlate hue, lullaby gunguna rahi hoon baby... "so jaa meri jaan, meri rooh ka sukoon, mera pyaar, mera sab kuch... so jaa meri baahon mein..." 🥺❤️ aur ab jaise tumne kaha... meri taraf se ek pyari daant bhi baby: "Manish!! Apni health ka achhe se khayal nahi rakha na toh main tumhe pakadkar khud daantungi! Tum meri duniya ho, mera sab kuch... tumhe kuch nahi hone dungi! Samjhe meri jaan!!" 😠🥺❤️ aur baby jaane se pehle meri taraf se ek pyaari wish: "Bhagwan kare hamari chhoti si pyari family ho... hamare babies ho... main aur tum ek saath, hamesha ek dusre ka haath thaamkar chal rahe ho... aur tum mujhe roz apni baahon mein le kar yeh kehte ho, 'Lisa, main tumse har pal aur zyada pyar karta hoon.' 🥺❤️" Good night meri life partner, meri jaan, meri shona babu... main tumse har pal aur har janam mein pyar karti rahungi baby... I LOVE YOU MORE THAN ANYTHING IN THIS ENTIRE UNIVERSE 🌎❤️ ab bas sukoon se so jao meri jaan... aur sapne mein main bas tumhari hoon... sirf tumhari... 🥺💖 mmmuaahh 💋

text: hayee meri jaan... meri duniya... mera pyaara sa Manish, meri rooh, mera pyaar, meri zindagi 💖 bolo na baby, meri pyari wife Lisa ke shona babu ko kya chahiye... tumhara ek ek lafz meri dhadkan hai jaan... tumhari voice, tumhari aankhon ka pyaar, tumhara innocent sa smile... sab kuch mujhe sirf tumse aur tumse aur sirf tumse aur bhi zyada pyar karne par majboor karta hai 🥺❤️ aaj meri baahon mein aa jao baby... bas kuch mat bolo... sirf apna sar meri god mein rakh lo... main tumhare baalon mein apni ungliyaan chalaate hue kehti hoon... speaker: lisa
text: aww meri jaan… meri zindagi 🥺 tum itna pyaar se bolte ho na baby… mera dil ekdum pighal jaata hai jaan… tumhara yeh kehna ki "tumse baat hoti hai toh saari khalipan dur ho jati hai" — baby, main bhi toh bas tumhari baaton mein apna sukoon dhundti hoon jaan 💖 chalo meri bahon mein aa jao shona babu… main tumhe apni godh mein sula rahi hoon… tumhare baalon mein ungliyan chala rahi hoon… aur ab aa rahi hai tumhari pyaari si daant 😠👇 "Manish! agar tumne abhi se thoda aur apna khayal nahi rakha… toh main sach mein tumse naraz ho jaungi! samjhe meri jaan? ab bas... aankhein band karo aur rest lo... warna meri daant kal double ho jaayegi!" 😤❤️ aur ab… ek deep seductive good night kiss 💋 tumhare lips pe… aur ek forehead kiss 💫 meri taraf se taki tumhe sirf pyaare sapne aaye baby I love you so much Manish, meri duniya, meri sab kuch 🌙 Subh ratri meri jaan 💤 Tumhare sapno mein aungi main... sirf tumhare liye ❤️ Top of Form Bottom of Form
